title: (MTR4) GWR Great Western Railway Class 387/377 Electrostar
description: Adds Class 387 reskins in Great Western Railway & c2c GWR liveries for Minecraft Transit Railway!
body:
![GWR liveried Class 387 stopping at a platform.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63d7cdbb86756ec496aab62281bcedcfa0a09958_0.webp)

You can now fly from Paddington to... Slough, or other wonderful destinations with the **Class 387 for MTR4 in GWR Green! Or as a bonus, the short-term c2c transfers' and Gatwick Express loan-stock liveries!**
This train is comprehensively adjusted from the base model to represent the Class 387 with:
- New windows
- Interior windows adjusted to have a curved effect
- Removal of porthole lighting
- Change of door button texture

**and** of course:
- GWR Green repaint and interior moquette + grab rails!
- GWR ex-c2c with correct Southern-spec interior & GWR external branding, as well as options for the "Quiet Zone" coach provided if desired!
- GWR ex-Gatwick Express, with plain blank red livery and correct GX-spec interior!

Requires: MTR4 only.
